_meta.purpose: Trust-building sentences for Brite Smile Dental Care in Hinglish. Used mid-review. Makes reader believe experience was real. Dental context only.
rules: Reference Dr. Priyank or 'doctor sahab' naturally — not every sentence
Mention: listening, patience, painless technique, explanation, equipment, personal attention
No exaggeration — must sound like a real person
Vary between doctor praise, staff praise, clinic environment praise
Single-doctor personal attention is a USP — mention it occasionally, never say 'kai dentists'

5star: Doctor sahab ne pehle poori baat suni, tab treatment bataya.
Staff bahut gentle tha — pehli baar kisi dental clinic mein itna comfortable feel hua.
Anesthesia ka kaam itna accha tha ki pata hi nahi chala kuch hua.
Doctor ne sab kuch explain kiya — kya ho raha hai, kyun ho raha hai, kitna time lagega.
Ek hi doctor poore case ko khud start se end tak dekhte hain — kahin aur refer nahi karte.
Clinic ekdum modern hai, equipment latest lagti hai.
Chair pe baith ke darr raha tha — doctor ne itna patient se handle kiya.
Mere bache ko bilkul zyada dara nahi — bahut patiently treat kiya gaya use.
Follow-up pe bhi utna hi dhyan diya jitna pehli visit pe.
Doctor ne rush nahi kiya — poora time diya consultation mein.
Pain management yahan actually accha hai — jo bolte hain wohi hota hai.
Receptionist se lekar doctor tak — sab zyada professional hain.
Unhone bataya ki doosri jagah kya galat hua tha mere saath — yeh confidence deta hai.
Equipment dekhke hi laga ki yahan sahi kaam hoga.
Maa ke liye aaya tha — woh bhi itni satisfied gayi ki maine bhi treatment le li.
Dr. Priyank ne khud check kiya aur clearly explain kiya — no vague answers.
Teen saal se usi problem ko ignore kar raha tha, yahan ek visit mein diagnosis sahi hua.
Staff ko bola tha bahut darr lagta hai — unhone poore procedure mein reassure karte rahe.
Clinic mein jo cleanliness thi woh khud reassuring thi.
Price bhi pehle hi clearly bata diya, koi surprise nahi mila baad mein.
4star: Doctor knowledgeable hain aur consultation acchi rahi.
Staff cooperative hai aur clinic clean hai.
Doctor ne treatment plan properly explain kiya.
Consultation mein dhyan se suna — good.
Clinic environment comfortable aur clean hai.
Reasonable explanation di medicines aur procedure ke liye.
Doctor ne poora time diya consultation mein.
Ek hi doctor sab kuch dekhte hain — RCT se lekar implants tak.
3star: Medicines consultation ke baad di gayi.
